coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across four cases covering pixelation, density, and structure. The packed queen-of-swords image is sampled into the img attribute in-browser. The gallery still uses its normalized comparison material rather than Blender's img/dens/grid Voronoi shader, so this proves geometry and attribute generation, not final shader parity.
